prompt: Crea uan landing page per uan squadra di calcio

tasks.task: Add a new section for the team introduction with a title and a brief description of the football team.
Create a section to showcase the team's players with their photos and positions.
Include a fixtures and results section where upcoming and past matches can be displayed.
Design a call-to-action area for fans to subscribe to a newsletter for updates.
Add a social media links footer integrated within the existing footer design.
Ensure responsive design for all newly added sections for optimal viewing on mobile devices.
